home.heroSubtitle: Privacy-first, free, no login needed. Your data stays where it belongs: in your browser.
home.trustEncDesc: All data is encrypted before it leaves your device. We use AES-256-GCM, the same standard used by banks and governments.
home.trustLocalDesc: QR codes generated locally. Files transferred peer-to-peer. Your data is processed entirely within your browser.
home.trustAutoDesc: Clipboard rooms expire automatically. Transfer sessions are ephemeral. Nothing persists beyond what you need.
home.toolADesc: Transfer files, images, or text between devices instantly. Encrypted P2P connection via QR code pairing.
home.toolBDesc: Generate high-fidelity QR codes or scan instantly from camera or image files. Privacy-first, local execution.
home.toolCDesc: A secure, ephemeral shared notepad. Sync text, links, and images across devices via encrypted rooms.
home.trustBadgeTitle: Your data never leaves your browser
home.zeroKnowledgeDesc: We cannot see, access, or decrypt your data.
home.noAccountDesc: Use all tools instantly without signing up.
home.openArchDesc: Our security model is transparent and auditable.

about.heroDesc: ToolPort was created to provide high-quality, privacy-first utilities that work right in your browser. No accounts, no installs, no data collection.
about.privacyDesc: Every tool is designed with zero-knowledge principles. Your data is processed locally in your browser or transferred peer-to-peer. We literally cannot see what you're doing.
about.accessDesc: Free for everyone. No login walls. No feature gates. Tools should be accessible.
about.transparentDesc: Open architecture. Our security model is auditable and our code is inspectable.
about.noNoiseDesc: We believe tools should feel calm and focused. No pop-ups, no aggressive upsells, no visual clutter. Just the tool you need, exactly when you need it.
about.securityDesc: All transfers use AES-256-GCM encryption. QR codes are generated 100% locally. Clipboard rooms auto-expire in 24 hours. We don't track, log, or analyze your usage.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.lifetimeHint: Best value: one payment, lifetime + future tools.
pricing.proDesc: Great for short-term projects and flexible usage.
pricing.yearDesc: Best for stable usage with locked annual savings.
pricing.lifeDesc: Pay once, unlock Pro forever, including future tools.
pricing.lifeFutureToolsFeature: All future ToolPort tools included for free
pricing.faq1Q: Can I purchase Monthly/Yearly/Lifetime right now?
pricing.faq1A: Not yet. We are currently collecting waitlist demand. Monthly, Yearly, and Lifetime are tracked separately, and we'll notify users in order when plans go live.
pricing.faq2Q: What's the difference between the three waitlists?
pricing.faq2A: Each waitlist maps to a specific subscription intent. Clicking a plan button adds you to that plan's queue so we can roll out and notify by plan type.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. Lifetime includes access to future ToolPort tools without requiring another subscription for those tools.
pricing.faq4Q: Will the free plan be removed or restricted?
pricing.faq4A: No. Core free tools stay available. Paid plans mainly add higher limits, long-term capabilities, and advanced features.
pricing.faq5Q: What new tools will be added next?
pricing.faq5A: We prioritize top-voted requests, including AI productivity tools, document workflows, and developer/design utilities. Lifetime members get access to newly added tools at no extra cost.

contact.title: Contact & Feedback
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with questions, feedback, or feature requests.

contact.successMsg: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.secureDesc: Your message is sent over encrypted channels. We never share your information with third parties.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.commitDesc: At ToolPort, your privacy is not just a feature. It's our foundation. We've built every tool with zero-knowledge principles. Your data is processed locally in your browser or transferred peer-to-peer. We literally cannot see what you're doing.
privacy.appliesToAll: This policy applies to all ToolPort tools and services.
privacy.toolADesc: All file and text transfers are peer-to-peer with end-to-end encryption. Nothing passes through our servers.
privacy.toolCDesc: Rooms auto-expire. E2EE available for sensitive content.
privacy.clauseCookiesContent: We use only two cookies: tp_lang (your language preference) and tp_theme (your theme preference). No tracking cookies, no analytics cookies, no third-party cookies.
privacy.clauseAnalyticsContent: We use privacy-respecting analytics to understand basic usage patterns. No personal data is collected. We do not use Google Analytics or any fingerprinting technology.
privacy.clauseThirdPartyContent: We may display ads via Google AdSense in the future. Google's advertising cookies are governed by Google's own privacy policy. You can opt out via your browser settings or our cookie management page.
privacy.clauseRetentionContent: We retain no user data. Transfer sessions are ephemeral. Clipboard rooms auto-expire after 24 hours. QR codes are generated locally and never stored on our servers.
privacy.ctaDesc: We're happy to explain anything in more detail.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using ToolPort ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part, please do not use our Service.

description.title: Description of Service
description.content: ToolPort provides free browser-based utility tools including file transfer, QR code generation/scanning, and online clipboard sharing. These tools operate primarily on the client side with minimal server interaction.

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: You may not use the Service for illegal purposes. You are responsible for the content you transfer or share. You must not attempt to abuse, exploit, or overload the Service.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.content: Your use of the Service is governed by our Privacy Policy. Tool A uses peer-to-peer encryption. Tool C rooms auto-expire after 24 hours. We do not collect or store personal data.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service, including its design system, code, and branding, is the property of ToolPort. You may use the tools freely but may not reproduce or redistribute the Service itself.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for data loss during transfers, service interruptions, or any damages resulting from the use of the Service.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated through the Service. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

error404.title: Page not
error404.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

toolRequest.seoDesc: Tell us what online tools you need: JSON formatter, image compressor, PDF toolkit, Markdown editor, password generator, color picker, and more. Vote to shape ToolPort's roadmap.

toolRequest.title: Tell Us What Tool You Need
toolRequest.desc: Every tool in ToolPort started as a real user request. Vote for the online tools you want most, or submit your own idea. Your feedback directly shapes our development roadmap.
toolRequest.voteTitle: Vote: Which online tool do you want most?
toolRequest.voteDesc: Select multiple. We'll prioritize the most-voted tools.
toolRequest.customTitle: Don't see what you need? Submit your idea
toolRequest.customDesc: We welcome any idea, from everyday utilities to professional-grade tools. The more detail, the easier it is for us to evaluate.
toolRequest.detailPlaceholder: Describe what this tool should do and when you'd use it...
toolRequest.emailPlaceholder: So we can notify you when it launches
toolRequest.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
toolRequest.thanks: Thanks for your feedback! Popular requests will be prioritized.
toolRequest.hint: Vote or enter a tool name to submit.
toolRequest.idea1Desc: Beautify, minify, and validate JSON online with syntax highlighting, error locations, and JSONPath queries.
toolRequest.idea2Desc: Compress PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF images locally with batch processing and format conversion. Nothing gets uploaded.
toolRequest.idea3Desc: Write Markdown with live preview, export to HTML and PDF. Built-in table and diagram syntax support.
toolRequest.idea4Desc: Generate secure random passwords with custom rules. Check existing passwords for strength and breach exposure.
toolRequest.idea5Desc: Merge, split, compress, and watermark PDF files in the browser. Fully local processing to protect your files.
toolRequest.idea6Desc: Pick colors from screen or images. Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL. Generate color schemes and gradients.
toolRequest.idea7Desc: Base64, URL encoding/decoding, HTML entity escaping. Supports both text and file modes.
toolRequest.idea8Desc: Highlight line-by-line differences between two texts or code blocks. Syntax coloring and split/unified views.
toolRequest.idea9Desc: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, HMAC hashes for text or files. All processing done locally.
toolRequest.idea10Desc: Edit and optimize SVG files online. Convert to PNG, ICO, and other formats. Generate favicons.
toolRequest.idea11Desc: Type a text prompt, AI generates illustrations, posters, avatars, and wallpapers in multiple art styles. Free online AI art generator.
toolRequest.idea12Desc: One-click AI background removal for portraits, products, and objects. Export transparent PNG. Free online AI cutout tool.
toolRequest.idea13Desc: AI-powered article, essay, marketing copy, and social media content generation. Adjust tone, length, and style.
toolRequest.idea14Desc: Convert text to natural-sounding speech. Multiple languages, male/female voices, adjustable speed. Perfect for video narration.
toolRequest.idea15Desc: AI super-resolution to upscale blurry images, restore old photos, denoise, and sharpen. Turn low-res into high-quality.
toolRequest.idea16Desc: LLM-powered smart translation across English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, French, German, and more. Preserves formatting and terminology.
toolRequest.idea17Desc: Upload a PDF or paste long text, and AI extracts key points into structured summaries, mind maps, and bullet lists.
toolRequest.idea18Desc: AI-powered text rewriting, tone adjustment, plagiarism reduction, and grammar correction. Perfect for essays and content creation.
toolRequest.idea19Desc: Enter your brand name and style, and AI generates multiple logo designs. Download as SVG and PNG. Free AI logo maker.
toolRequest.idea20Desc: Upload a selfie, AI generates professional headshots, social avatars, and digital portraits with auto-enhancement.
toolRequest.idea21Desc: AI-generated regex, SQL queries, shell commands. Explain code logic and convert between programming languages.
toolRequest.idea22Desc: Upload a photo, and AI accurately recognizes printed text, handwriting, and tables. Export as editable text or Excel.
toolRequest.idea23Desc: AI detects and removes watermarks, text overlays, and logos from images and videos. Auto-inpaints the background.
toolRequest.idea24Desc: Enter a topic or outline, and AI generates a complete slide deck with layout, color scheme, and images.
toolRequest.liveDesc: These tools are live and ready to use: free, no signup, and all data processed locally.
toolRequest.toolADesc: Scan a QR code to create an end-to-end encrypted P2P connection. Transfer files, images, and text between your phone and computer instantly, with no app install required.
toolRequest.toolBDesc: Generate custom QR codes with logos, colors, and batch CSV import. Scan and decode QR codes from camera or image files. All processing done locally.
toolRequest.toolCDesc: Create encrypted rooms to sync text, links, and images across devices in real-time. End-to-end encrypted, rooms auto-expire in 24 hours.
toolRequest.faq1A: Yes, all core tools are free forever. We believe essential tools should be open to everyone, with no login walls or feature restrictions. Pro offers higher limits and advanced features, while free tools stay fully functional.
toolRequest.faq2Q: Do these tools upload my data?
toolRequest.faq2A: No. All ToolPort tools process data locally in your browser, including image compression, JSON formatting, and hash calculation. File transfers use end-to-end encrypted WebRTC P2P connections, so data never touches our servers.
toolRequest.faq3Q: How soon will my voted tool be available?
toolRequest.faq3A: We review votes monthly. Popular requests typically enter development within 1-2 months. More complex tools may take longer. Leave your email and we'll notify you the moment it launches.
toolRequest.faq4Q: Can I suggest improvements to existing tools?
toolRequest.faq4A: Absolutely. Use the custom submission section to describe the improvement and why it matters. We value optimization suggestions just as much as new tool ideas.
toolRequest.faq5Q: How is ToolPort different from other online tool sites?
toolRequest.faq5A: ToolPort is privacy-first: all data is processed locally, no user tracking, no account required. File transfers use WebRTC end-to-end encryption. Clipboard rooms auto-expire after 24 hours. Zero data collection.
